radiohead: You're not depressed, you're just a CS major in your Thom Yorke phase.

arctic monkeys: You think being emotionally unavailable is the same as being mysterious.
mac demarco: You'll ghost someone and then invite them to 'just hang' on the Arts Quad.
cigarettes after sex: Your entire personality is dim lighting and poor communication.
daniel caesar: You're composing a breakup monologue in your head while still on the first date.

joji: You post 'I'm fine' on your story at 3am. You are not fine.
tyler, the creator: You fell in love with someone emotionally unavailable and thought 'I can fix them.'
ethel cain: You describe your love life as 'Southern Gothic' even though you're from Long Island.
lizzy mcalpine: You cried to 'ceilings' in a Collegetown apartment and traumatized your roommate.
gracie abrams: You write 'I miss you' texts you never send and consider it growth.
boygenius: You're not looking for a relationship, you're looking for someone to process your childhood with.

men i trust: You describe the situationship as 'chill' while sobbing into your pillow.

the smiths: You've been single since before Morrissey was problematic, which is saying something.

deftones: You want to hold someone's hand but also, like, in a vaguely threatening way.
the national: You're 30 emotionally but 20 chronologically and it shows.
lorde: You turned getting left on read into a full theatrical production.
weyes blood: You'll take someone stargazing and somehow make it about your ex.
bad bunny: You're either the life of the party or crying in the bathroom. No in between.
